mano_cua.result_summary: 双击画板空白区域无法创建文本元素。在多个位置（400,150）（640,620）（400,550）（200,600）分别双击，均无任何反应——未创建文本元素、未出现输入框、未显示光标、无法输入文字。工具栏未渲染/不可见，应用可能处于非编辑状态。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Double-clicking at (400, 550) on a completely blank area at the bottom still did nothing. No text element was created, no text input appeared, no cursor was shown. Multiple attempts at different positions all failed to create text elements. The toolbar was missing from the interface (a rendering bug), which may have put the canvas in an inactive/broken state for editing.
